config.name: nginx_kvlog_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: nginx_kvlog_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: HTTP Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:24:36.194342

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local TIMESTAMP_PATTERN = "^(%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%d %d%d:%d%d:%d%d)"
local KV_PATTERN = "([^=]+)=\"([^\"]+)\""

-- Local cache of common strings
local local_strings = {
    time_local = "time_local",
    metadata = "metadata",
    class_uid = "class_uid",
    time = "time"
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local vars
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "HTTP Activity", 
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        metadata = {},
        time = nil
    }

    -- Process timestamp (time_local)
    local timestamp = record[local_strings.time_local]
    if timestamp then
        -- Extract timestamp using pattern matching
        local ts = string.match(timestamp, TIMESTAMP_PATTERN)
        if ts then
            -- Convert to UNIX milliseconds (simplified example)
            output.time = os.time({
                year = string.sub(ts,1,4),
                month = string.sub(ts,6,7),
                day = string.sub(ts,9,10),
                hour = string.sub(ts,12,13),
                min = string.sub(ts,15,16),
                sec = string.sub(ts,18,19)
            }) * 1000
        end
    end

    -- Process key-value pairs into metadata
    local metadata = {}
    for k,v in pairs(record) do
        -- Skip already processed fields
        if k ~= local_strings.time_local then
            -- Sanitize and validate values
            if type(v) == "string" then
                metadata[k] = string.match(v, "^[%s%w%.%-_@]+$") and v or nil
            elseif type(v) == "number" then
                metadata[k] = v
            end
        end
    end
    
    if next(metadata) then
        output.metadata = metadata
    end

    -- Validation and cleanup
    if not output[local_strings.class_uid] or output[local_strings.class_uid] == 0 then
        return nil, "Invalid class_uid"
    end

    -- Add default timestamp if not present
    if not output[local_strings.time] then
        output[local_strings.time] = os.time() * 1000
    end

    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local status, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if status then
        return result
    else
        return nil, "Transform error: " .. tostring(result)
    end
end
